name: Sugar Ray Ledesma
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer | Python, Django, Node.js | React, Next.js, TypeScript | AWS
base_skills: Backend Engineering: Python, Django, Django REST Framework, Node.js, Express.js, REST API Architecture, GraphQL APIs, Microservices Design, API Security
Frontend Engineering: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Redux, Tailwind CSS, Responsive UI Architecture, Component-Based Design Systems
Database Engineering: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Schema Design, Query Optimization, Indexing Strategies, Data Modeling
Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD Pipelines, GitHub Actions, Infrastructure Automation
Asynchronous & Distributed Systems: Celery, Redis, Event-Driven Architecture, Background Jobs, Task Queues
Security & Reliability: OAuth 2.0, JWT Authentication, Access Control Architecture, Application Security, Monitoring
Testing & Engineering Practices: Unit Testing, Integration Testing, Jest, Cypress, Debugging, Agile/Scrum

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer | Cloud & API Platforms
base_bullets: Designed and deployed scalable REST and GraphQL APIs using Node.js, Express.js, and modular service architecture supporting high-traffic SaaS platforms.
Built production frontend platforms using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Redux, enabling responsive and high-performance user interfaces.
Implemented asynchronous processing pipelines and event-driven workflows, improving system responsiveness for background tasks and data processing.
Architected optimized PostgreSQL and MongoDB database structures, improving query performance and reducing API latency.
Implemented secure authentication and access control systems using JWT and OAuth 2.0, strengthening application security and user management.
Deployed scalable services on AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda), ensuring high availability and reliability.
Implemented containerized infrastructure using Docker and Kubernetes, enabling reproducible environments and scalable deployments.
Built automated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, enabling faster release cycles and reliable production deployments.
Implemented comprehensive testing strategies using Jest and Cypress, improving code quality and reducing regression risks.

experience.title: Backend Software Engineer | Cloud Services & API Systems
base_bullets: Designed scalable backend services using Node.js, Express.js, and GraphQL APIs supporting distributed enterprise systems.
Engineered secure authentication frameworks using OAuth 2.0 and JWT, enabling robust access control across microservices.
Optimized PostgreSQL and MongoDB database performance through indexing strategies, query optimization, and schema restructuring.
Implemented resilient backend architectures deployed on AWS cloud infrastructure (Lambda, EC2, S3).
Built containerized deployment pipelines using Docker, improving environment consistency and deployment reliability.
Defined API contracts and integration standards enabling smooth communication between frontend services and backend systems.
Collaborated with product and engineering teams to deliver scalable backend architectures aligned with long-term platform growth.
Investigated and resolved production performance issues, ensuring system reliability and operational stability.

experience.title: Frontend Software Engineer | Web Platforms
base_bullets: Developed high-performance user interfaces using React, Vue.js, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, and Material UI, improving usability and visual consistency across enterprise applications.
Built dynamic analytics dashboards that streamlined internal operations and enhanced business decision-making through clearer data visualization.
Refactored legacy UI components into scalable, modular, reusable architectures, reducing technical debt and improving long-term maintainability.
Integrated frontend systems with Node.js APIs and Firebase services, enabling secure data exchange and real-time application functionality.
Supported AWS-hosted deployment environments and CI/CD workflows, building strong foundational DevOps capabilities and release discipline.
